rule_metadata.name: SUSP_BAT_OBFUSC_Jul24_1
rule_metadata.description: Detects indicators of obfuscation in Windows Batch files
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_BAT_OBFUSC_Jul24_1
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects indicators of obfuscation in Windows Batch files"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://x.com/0xToxin/status/1811656147943752045"
		date = "2024-07-12"
		score = 70
		id = "801e7efc-2c31-5590-afcd-9e11072c9c65"

	strings:
		$s1 = "&&set "

	condition:
		filesize < 300KB and uint32( 0 ) == 0x20746573 and $s1 in ( 0 .. 32 )
}

rule_metadata.name: SUSP_BAT_OBFUSC_Jul24_2
rule_metadata.description: Detects indicators of obfuscation in Windows Batch files
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_BAT_OBFUSC_Jul24_2
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects indicators of obfuscation in Windows Batch files"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://x.com/0xToxin/status/1811656147943752045"
		date = "2024-07-12"
		score = 70
		id = "999cd365-2862-5618-b0b6-ee45dea1e9cf"

	strings:
		$s1 = "&&set "

	condition:
		filesize < 300KB and #s1 > 30 and uint16( filesize - 2 ) == 0x0a0d and uint8( filesize - 3 ) == 0x25
}

rule_metadata.name: SUSP_BAT_OBFUSC_Jul24_3
rule_metadata.description: Detects indicators of obfuscation in Windows Batch files
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_BAT_OBFUSC_Jul24_3
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects indicators of obfuscation in Windows Batch files"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://x.com/0xToxin/status/1811656147943752045"
		date = "2024-07-12"
		score = 70
		id = "a484ed03-8588-55e7-9674-b1208e14eb3f"

	strings:
		$s1 = "% \\\\%"
		$s2 = { 3D ?? 26 26 73 65 74 20 }

	condition:
		filesize < 300KB and all of them
}
